pre_game.message: Hey G, I'm J — nice to meet you. I'm here to win big today; what brings you to the game?
Hey J, I’m G — I love games and I’m here to try my luck and win money for myself and the people I care about.
Nice to meet you, G — I’m here to win too; I’d buy a $45,000 car if I hit it big. What would you do with the money?
I'd pay off debts, help my family, save/invest the rest, and treat myself to a new gaming rig and a short trip.
Love that — responsible and fun. Paying debts and helping family first is smart, and I’d be jealous of that gaming rig. Good luck to both of us!
Thanks, J — appreciate it! Good luck to you too; hope we both win big (and if you get that car, save me a ride!).
You got it — if I get that car you're first on the passenger list. Good luck, G!
Deal — I’ll hold you to that! Good luck, J; may we both win big.
You bet — I’ll save you the first ride. Good luck to both of us!
Thanks — I’ll hold you to it! Good luck to both of us!
Promise — you’ll be first in line for a ride if I win. Good luck!
Thanks, J — I’ll hold you to that! Good luck — may we both win big.
Appreciate it, G — I’ll hold you to the ride! Good luck to both of us, let’s win this.
You got it, J — I’ll hold you to that ride! Let’s win this; good luck to both of us.
You bet — I’ll hold you to it! Let’s win big.
You got it — I’ll hold you to that! Let’s win big.
